events.name: bp_de_redirect
events.desc: Decode Redirects

events.name: bp_dyn_ind_pred
events.desc: Dynamic Indirect Predictions

events.name: bp_l1_btb_correct
events.desc: L1 Branch Prediction Overrides Existing Prediction (speculative)

events.name: bp_l1_tlb_fetch_hit
events.desc: The number of instruction fetches that hit in the L1 ITLB

events.name: bp_l1_tlb_fetch_hit.if1g
events.desc: The number of instruction fetches that hit in the L1 ITLB. L1 Instruction TLB hit (1G page size)

events.name: bp_l1_tlb_fetch_hit.if2m
events.desc: The number of instruction fetches that hit in the L1 ITLB. L1 Instruction TLB hit (2M page size)

events.name: bp_l1_tlb_fetch_hit.if4k
events.desc: The number of instruction fetches that hit in the L1 ITLB. L1 Instrcution TLB hit (4K or 16K page size)

events.name: bp_l2_btb_correct
events.desc: L2 Branch Prediction Overrides Existing Prediction (speculative)

events.name: bp_tlb_rel
events.desc: The number of ITLB reload requests

events.name: bp_l1_tlb_miss_l2_tlb_hit
events.desc: L1 ITLB Miss, L2 ITLB Hit. The number of instruction fetches that miss in the L1 ITLB but hit in the L2 ITLB

events.name: bp_l1_tlb_miss_l2_tlb_miss
events.desc: The number of instruction fetches that miss in both the L1 and L2 TLBs

events.name: bp_l1_tlb_miss_l2_tlb_miss.coalesced_4k
events.desc: The number of valid fills into the ITLB originating from the LS Page-Table Walker. Tablewalk requests are issued for L1-ITLB and L2-ITLB misses. Walk for >4K Coalesced page

events.name: bp_l1_tlb_miss_l2_tlb_miss.if1g
events.desc: The number of valid fills into the ITLB originating from the LS Page-Table Walker. Tablewalk requests are issued for L1-ITLB and L2-ITLB misses. Walk for 1G page

events.name: bp_l1_tlb_miss_l2_tlb_miss.if2m
events.desc: The number of valid fills into the ITLB originating from the LS Page-Table Walker. Tablewalk requests are issued for L1-ITLB and L2-ITLB misses. Walk for 2M page

events.name: bp_l1_tlb_miss_l2_tlb_miss.if4k
events.desc: The number of valid fills into the ITLB originating from the LS Page-Table Walker. Tablewalk requests are issued for L1-ITLB and L2-ITLB misses. Walk to 4K page

events.name: bp_snp_re_sync
events.desc: The number of pipeline restarts caused by invalidating probes that hit on the instruction stream currently being executed. This would happen if the active instruction stream was being modified by another processor in an MP system - typically a highly unlikely event

events.name: ic_cache_fill_l2
events.desc: Instruction Cache Refills from L2. The number of 64 byte instruction cache line was fulfilled from the L2 cache

events.name: ic_cache_fill_sys
events.desc: Instruction Cache Refills from System. The number of 64 byte instruction cache line fulfilled from system memory or another cache

events.name: ic_cache_inval.fill_invalidated
events.desc: IC line invalidated due to overwriting fill response. The number of instruction cache lines invalidated. A non-SMC event is CMC (cross modifying code), either from the other thread of the core or another core

events.name: ic_cache_inval.l2_invalidating_probe
events.desc: IC line invalidated due to L2 invalidating probe (external or LS). The number of instruction cache lines invalidated. A non-SMC event is CMC (cross modifying code), either from the other thread of the core or another core

events.name: ic_fetch_stall.ic_stall_any
events.desc: Instruction Pipe Stall. IC pipe was stalled during this clock cycle for any reason (nothing valid in pipe ICM1)

events.name: ic_fetch_stall.ic_stall_back_pressure
events.desc: Instruction Pipe Stall. IC pipe was stalled during this clock cycle (including IC to OC fetches) due to back-pressure

events.name: ic_fetch_stall.ic_stall_dq_empty
events.desc: Instruction Pipe Stall. IC pipe was stalled during this clock cycle (including IC to OC fetches) due to DQ empty

events.name: ic_fw32
events.desc: The number of 32B fetch windows transferred from IC pipe to DE instruction decoder (includes non-cacheable and cacheable fill responses)

events.name: ic_fw32_miss
events.desc: The number of 32B fetch windows tried to read the L1 IC and missed in the full tag

events.name: ic_oc_mode_switch.ic_oc_mode_switch
events.desc: OC Mode Switch. IC to OC mode switch

events.name: ic_oc_mode_switch.oc_ic_mode_switch
events.desc: OC Mode Switch. OC to IC mode switch

events.name: ic_tag_hit_miss.all_instruction_cache_accesses
events.desc: All Instruction Cache Accesses. Counts various IC tag related hit and miss events

events.name: ic_tag_hit_miss.instruction_cache_hit
events.desc: Instruction Cache Hit. Counts various IC tag related hit and miss events

events.name: ic_tag_hit_miss.instruction_cache_miss
events.desc: Instruction Cache Miss. Counts various IC tag related hit and miss events

events.name: l2_cache_req_stat.ic_access_in_l2
events.desc: Core to L2 cacheable request access status (not including L2 Prefetch). Instruction cache requests in L2

events.name: l2_cache_req_stat.ic_dc_hit_in_l2
events.desc: Core to L2 cacheable request access status (not including L2 Prefetch). Instruction cache request hit in L2 and Data cache request hit in L2 (all types)

events.name: l2_cache_req_stat.ic_dc_miss_in_l2
events.desc: Core to L2 cacheable request access status (not including L2 Prefetch). Instruction cache request miss in L2 and Data cache request miss in L2 (all types)

events.name: l2_cache_req_stat.ic_fill_hit_s
events.desc: Core to L2 cacheable request access status (not including L2 Prefetch). Instruction cache hit non-modifiable line in L2

events.name: l2_cache_req_stat.ic_fill_hit_x
events.desc: Core to L2 cacheable request access status (not including L2 Prefetch). Instruction cache hit modifiable line in L2

events.name: l2_cache_req_stat.ic_fill_miss
events.desc: Core to L2 cacheable request access status (not including L2 Prefetch). Instruction cache request miss in L2. Use l2_cache_misses_from_ic_miss instead

events.name: l2_cache_req_stat.ls_rd_blk_c
events.desc: Core to L2 cacheable request access status (not including L2 Prefetch). Data cache request miss in L2 (all types). Use l2_cache_misses_from_dc_misses instead

events.name: l2_cache_req_stat.ls_rd_blk_cs
events.desc: Core to L2 cacheable request access status (not including L2 Prefetch). Data cache shared read hit in L2

events.name: l2_cache_req_stat.ls_rd_blk_l_hit_s
events.desc: Core to L2 cacheable request access status (not including L2 Prefetch). Data cache read hit non-modifiable line in L2

events.name: l2_cache_req_stat.ls_rd_blk_l_hit_x
events.desc: Core to L2 cacheable request access status (not including L2 Prefetch). Data cache read hit in L2. Modifiable

events.name: l2_cache_req_stat.ls_rd_blk_x
events.desc: Core to L2 cacheable request access status (not including L2 Prefetch). Data cache store or state change hit in L2

events.name: l2_fill_pending.l2_fill_busy
events.desc: Cycles with fill pending from L2. Total cycles spent with one or more fill requests in flight from L2

events.name: l2_latency.l2_cycles_waiting_on_fills
events.desc: Total cycles spent waiting for L2 fills to complete from L3 or memory, divided by four. Event counts are for both threads. To calculate average latency, the number of fills from both threads must be used

events.name: l2_pf_hit_l2
events.desc: L2 prefetch hit in L2. Use l2_cache_hits_from_l2_hwpf instead

events.name: l2_pf_miss_l2_hit_l3
events.desc: L2 prefetcher hits in L3. Counts all L2 prefetches accepted by the L2 pipeline which miss the L2 cache and hit the L3

events.name: l2_pf_miss_l2_l3
events.desc: L2 prefetcher misses in L3. Counts all L2 prefetches accepted by the L2 pipeline which miss the L2 and the L3 caches

events.name: l2_request_g1.all_no_prefetch
events.desc: (null)

events.name: l2_request_g1.cacheable_ic_read
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 1 - Common). Instruction cache reads

events.name: l2_request_g1.change_to_x
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 1 - Common). Data cache state change requests. Request change to writable, check L2 for current state

events.name: l2_request_g1.group2
events.desc: Miscellaneous events covered in more detail by l2_request_g2 (PMCx061)

events.name: l2_request_g1.l2_hw_pf
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 1 - Common). L2 Prefetcher. All prefetches accepted by L2 pipeline, hit or miss. Types of PF and L2 hit/miss broken out in a separate perfmon event

events.name: l2_request_g1.ls_rd_blk_c_s
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 1 - Common). Data cache shared reads

events.name: l2_request_g1.prefetch_l2_cmd
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 1 - Common). PrefetchL2Cmd

events.name: l2_request_g1.rd_blk_l
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 1 - Common). Data cache reads (including hardware and software prefetch)

events.name: l2_request_g1.rd_blk_x
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 1 - Common). Data cache stores

events.name: l2_request_g2.bus_locks_originator
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 2 - Rare). Bus locks

events.name: l2_request_g2.bus_locks_responses
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 2 - Rare). Bus lock response

events.name: l2_request_g2.group1
events.desc: Miscellaneous events covered in more detail by l2_request_g1 (PMCx060)

events.name: l2_request_g2.ic_rd_sized
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 2 - Rare). Instruction cache read sized

events.name: l2_request_g2.ic_rd_sized_nc
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 2 - Rare). Instruction cache read sized non-cacheable

events.name: l2_request_g2.ls_rd_sized
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 2 - Rare). Data cache read sized

events.name: l2_request_g2.ls_rd_sized_nc
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 2 - Rare). Data cache read sized non-cacheable

events.name: l2_request_g2.smc_inval
events.desc: All L2 Cache Requests (Breakdown 2 - Rare). Self-modifying code invalidates

events.name: l2_wcb_req.cl_zero
events.desc: LS to L2 WCB cache line zeroing requests. LS (Load/Store unit) to L2 WCB (Write Combining Buffer) cache line zeroing requests

events.name: l2_wcb_req.wcb_close
events.desc: LS to L2 WCB close requests. LS (Load/Store unit) to L2 WCB (Write Combining Buffer) close requests

events.name: l2_wcb_req.wcb_write
events.desc: LS to L2 WCB write requests. LS (Load/Store unit) to L2 WCB (Write Combining Buffer) write requests

events.name: l2_wcb_req.zero_byte_store
events.desc: LS to L2 WCB zero byte store requests. LS (Load/Store unit) to L2 WCB (Write Combining Buffer) zero byte store requests

events.name: op_cache_hit_miss.all_op_cache_accesses
events.desc: All Op Cache accesses. Counts Op Cache micro-tag hit/miss events

events.name: op_cache_hit_miss.op_cache_hit
events.desc: Op Cache Hit. Counts Op Cache micro-tag hit/miss events

events.name: op_cache_hit_miss.op_cache_miss
events.desc: Op Cache Miss. Counts Op Cache micro-tag hit/miss events

events.name: ex_div_busy
events.desc: Div Cycles Busy count

events.name: ex_div_count
events.desc: Div Op Count

events.name: ex_ret_brn
events.desc: Retired Branch Instructions

events.name: ex_ret_brn_far
events.desc: Retired Far Control Transfers

events.name: ex_ret_brn_ind_misp
events.desc: Retired Indirect Branch Instructions Mispredicted

events.name: ex_ret_brn_misp
events.desc: Retired Branch Instructions Mispredicted

events.name: ex_ret_brn_resync
events.desc: Retired Branch Resyncs

events.name: ex_ret_brn_tkn
events.desc: Retired Taken Branch Instructions

events.name: ex_ret_brn_tkn_misp
events.desc: Retired Taken Branch Instructions Mispredicted

events.name: ex_ret_cond
events.desc: Retired Conditional Branch Instructions

events.name: ex_ret_fused_instr
events.desc: Counts retired Fused Instructions

events.name: ex_ret_ind_brch_instr
events.desc: Retired Indirect Branch Instructions. The number of indirect branches retired

events.name: ex_ret_instr
events.desc: Retired Instructions

events.name: ex_ret_mmx_fp_instr.mmx_instr
events.desc: MMX instructions

events.name: ex_ret_mmx_fp_instr.sse_instr
events.desc: SSE instructions (SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSSE3, SSE4A, SSE41, SSE42, AVX)

events.name: ex_ret_mmx_fp_instr.x87_instr
events.desc: x87 instructions

events.name: ex_ret_msprd_brnch_instr_dir_msmtch
events.desc: Retired Mispredicted Branch Instructions due to Direction Mismatch

events.name: ex_ret_near_ret
events.desc: Retired Near Returns

events.name: ex_ret_near_ret_mispred
events.desc: Retired Near Returns Mispredicted

events.name: ex_ret_ops
events.desc: Retired Ops. Use macro_ops_retired instead

events.name: ex_tagged_ibs_ops.ibs_count_rollover
events.desc: Tagged IBS Ops. Number of times an op could not be tagged by IBS because of a previous tagged op that has not retired

events.name: ex_tagged_ibs_ops.ibs_tagged_ops
events.desc: Tagged IBS Ops. Number of Ops tagged by IBS

events.name: ex_tagged_ibs_ops.ibs_tagged_ops_ret
events.desc: Tagged IBS Ops. Number of Ops tagged by IBS that retired

events.name: fp_disp_faults.x87_fill_fault
events.desc: Floating Point Dispatch Faults. x87 fill fault

events.name: fp_disp_faults.xmm_fill_fault
events.desc: Floating Point Dispatch Faults. XMM fill fault

events.name: fp_disp_faults.ymm_fill_fault
events.desc: Floating Point Dispatch Faults. YMM fill fault

events.name: fp_disp_faults.ymm_spill_fault
events.desc: Floating Point Dispatch Faults. YMM spill fault

events.name: fp_num_mov_elim_scal_op.opt_potential
events.desc: Number of Ops that are candidates for optimization (have Z-bit either set or pass). This is a dispatch based speculative event, and is useful for measuring the effectiveness of the Move elimination and Scalar code optimization schemes

events.name: fp_num_mov_elim_scal_op.optimized
events.desc: Number of Scalar Ops optimized. This is a dispatch based speculative event, and is useful for measuring the effectiveness of the Move elimination and Scalar code optimization schemes

events.name: fp_num_mov_elim_scal_op.sse_mov_ops
events.desc: Number of SSE Move Ops. This is a dispatch based speculative event, and is useful for measuring the effectiveness of the Move elimination and Scalar code optimization schemes

events.name: fp_num_mov_elim_scal_op.sse_mov_ops_elim
events.desc: Number of SSE Move Ops eliminated. This is a dispatch based speculative event, and is useful for measuring the effectiveness of the Move elimination and Scalar code optimization schemes

events.name: fp_ret_sse_avx_ops.add_sub_flops
events.desc: Add/subtract FLOPs. This is a retire-based event. The number of retired SSE/AVX FLOPs. The number of events logged per cycle can vary from 0 to 64. This event requires the use of the MergeEvent since it can count above 15 events per cycle. See 2.1.17.3 [Large Increment per Cycle Events]. It does not provide a useful count without the use of the MergeEvent

events.name: fp_ret_sse_avx_ops.all
events.desc: All FLOPS. This is a retire-based event. The number of retired SSE/AVX FLOPS. The number of events logged per cycle can vary from 0 to 64. This event can count above 15

events.name: fp_ret_sse_avx_ops.div_flops
events.desc: Divide/square root FLOPs. This is a retire-based event. The number of retired SSE/AVX FLOPs. The number of events logged per cycle can vary from 0 to 64. This event requires the use of the MergeEvent since it can count above 15 events per cycle. See 2.1.17.3 [Large Increment per Cycle Events]. It does not provide a useful count without the use of the MergeEvent

events.name: fp_ret_sse_avx_ops.mac_flops
events.desc: Multiply-Accumulate FLOPs. Each MAC operation is counted as 2 FLOPS. This is a retire-based event. The number of retired SSE/AVX FLOPs. The number of events logged per cycle can vary from 0 to 64. This event requires the use of the MergeEvent since it can count above 15 events per cycle. See 2.1.17.3 [Large Increment per Cycle Events]. It does not provide a useful count without the use of the MergeEvent

events.name: fp_ret_sse_avx_ops.mult_flops
events.desc: Multiply FLOPs. This is a retire-based event. The number of retired SSE/AVX FLOPs. The number of events logged per cycle can vary from 0 to 64. This event requires the use of the MergeEvent since it can count above 15 events per cycle. See 2.1.17.3 [Large Increment per Cycle Events]. It does not provide a useful count without the use of the MergeEvent

events.name: fp_retired_ser_ops.sse_bot_ret
events.desc: SSE/AVX bottom-executing ops retired. The number of serializing Ops retired

events.name: fp_retired_ser_ops.sse_ctrl_ret
events.desc: SSE/AVX control word mispredict traps. The number of serializing Ops retired

events.name: fp_retired_ser_ops.x87_bot_ret
events.desc: x87 bottom-executing ops retired. The number of serializing Ops retired

events.name: fp_retired_ser_ops.x87_ctrl_ret
events.desc: x87 control word mispredict traps due to mispredictions in RC or PC, or changes in mask bits. The number of serializing Ops retired

events.name: fpu_pipe_assignment.total
events.desc: Total number of fp uOps

events.name: fpu_pipe_assignment.total0
events.desc: Total number of fp uOps on pipe 0

events.name: fpu_pipe_assignment.total1
events.desc: Total number uOps assigned to pipe 1

events.name: fpu_pipe_assignment.total2
events.desc: Total number uOps assigned to pipe 2

events.name: fpu_pipe_assignment.total3
events.desc: Total number uOps assigned to pipe 3

events.name: ls_alloc_mab_count
events.desc: Count of Allocated Mabs

events.name: ls_any_fills_from_sys.ext_cache_local
events.desc: Any Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From cache of different CCX in same node

events.name: ls_any_fills_from_sys.ext_cache_remote
events.desc: Any Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From CCX Cache in different Node

events.name: ls_any_fills_from_sys.int_cache
events.desc: Any Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From L3 or different L2 in same CCX

events.name: ls_any_fills_from_sys.lcl_l2
events.desc: Any Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From Local L2 to the core

events.name: ls_any_fills_from_sys.mem_io_local
events.desc: Any Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From DRAM or IO connected in same node

events.name: ls_any_fills_from_sys.mem_io_remote
events.desc: Any Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From DRAM or IO connected in different Node

events.name: ls_bad_status2.stli_other
events.desc: Non-forwardable conflict; used to reduce STLI's via software. All reasons. Store To Load Interlock (STLI) are loads that were unable to complete because of a possible match with an older store, and the older store could not do STLF for some reason

events.name: ls_dc_accesses
events.desc: Number of accesses to the dcache for load/store references

events.name: ls_dispatch.ld_dispatch
events.desc: Dispatch of a single op that performs a memory load. Counts the number of operations dispatched to the LS unit. Unit Masks ADDed

events.name: ls_dispatch.ld_st_dispatch
events.desc: Load-op-Store Dispatch. Dispatch of a single op that performs a load from and store to the same memory address. Counts the number of operations dispatched to the LS unit. Unit Masks ADDed

events.name: ls_dispatch.store_dispatch
events.desc: Dispatch of a single op that performs a memory store. Counts the number of operations dispatched to the LS unit. Unit Masks ADDed

events.name: ls_dmnd_fills_from_sys.ext_cache_local
events.desc: Demand Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From cache of different CCX in same node

events.name: ls_dmnd_fills_from_sys.ext_cache_remote
events.desc: Demand Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From CCX Cache in different Node

events.name: ls_dmnd_fills_from_sys.int_cache
events.desc: Demand Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From L3 or different L2 in same CCX

events.name: ls_dmnd_fills_from_sys.lcl_l2
events.desc: Demand Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From Local L2 to the core

events.name: ls_dmnd_fills_from_sys.mem_io_local
events.desc: Demand Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From DRAM or IO connected in same node

events.name: ls_dmnd_fills_from_sys.mem_io_remote
events.desc: Demand Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From DRAM or IO connected in different Node

events.name: ls_hw_pf_dc_fills.ext_cache_local
events.desc: Hardware Prefetch Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From cache of different CCX in same node

events.name: ls_hw_pf_dc_fills.ext_cache_remote
events.desc: Hardware Prefetch Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From CCX Cache in different Node

events.name: ls_hw_pf_dc_fills.int_cache
events.desc: Hardware Prefetch Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From L3 or different L2 in same CCX

events.name: ls_hw_pf_dc_fills.lcl_l2
events.desc: Hardware Prefetch Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From Local L2 to the core

events.name: ls_hw_pf_dc_fills.mem_io_local
events.desc: Hardware Prefetch Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From DRAM or IO connected in same node

events.name: ls_hw_pf_dc_fills.mem_io_remote
events.desc: Hardware Prefetch Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From DRAM or IO connected in different Node

events.name: ls_inef_sw_pref.data_pipe_sw_pf_dc_hit
events.desc: The number of software prefetches that did not fetch data outside of the processor core. Software PREFETCH instruction saw a DC hit

events.name: ls_inef_sw_pref.mab_mch_cnt
events.desc: The number of software prefetches that did not fetch data outside of the processor core. Software PREFETCH instruction saw a match on an already-allocated miss request buffer

events.name: ls_int_taken
events.desc: Counts the number of interrupts taken

events.name: ls_l1_d_tlb_miss.all
events.desc: All L1 DTLB Misses or Reloads. Use l1_dtlb_misses instead

events.name: ls_l1_d_tlb_miss.tlb_reload_1g_l2_hit
events.desc: L1 DTLB Miss. DTLB reload to a 1G page that hit in the L2 TLB

events.name: ls_l1_d_tlb_miss.tlb_reload_1g_l2_miss
events.desc: L1 DTLB Miss. DTLB reload to a 1G page that also missed in the L2 TLB

events.name: ls_l1_d_tlb_miss.tlb_reload_2m_l2_hit
events.desc: L1 DTLB Miss. DTLB reload to a 2M page that hit in the L2 TLB

events.name: ls_l1_d_tlb_miss.tlb_reload_2m_l2_miss
events.desc: L1 DTLB Miss. DTLB reload to a 2M page that also missed in the L2 TLB

events.name: ls_l1_d_tlb_miss.tlb_reload_4k_l2_hit
events.desc: L1 DTLB Miss. DTLB reload to a 4K page that hit in the L2 TLB

events.name: ls_l1_d_tlb_miss.tlb_reload_4k_l2_miss
events.desc: L1 DTLB Miss. DTLB reload to a 4K page that missed the L2 TLB

events.name: ls_l1_d_tlb_miss.tlb_reload_coalesced_page_hit
events.desc: L1 DTLB Miss. DTLB reload to a coalesced page that hit in the L2 TLB

events.name: ls_l1_d_tlb_miss.tlb_reload_coalesced_page_miss
events.desc: L1 DTLB Miss. DTLB reload coalesced page that also missed in the L2 TLB

events.name: ls_locks.bus_lock
events.desc: Retired lock instructions. Comparable to legacy bus lock

events.name: ls_locks.non_spec_lock

events.name: ls_locks.spec_lock_hi_spec
events.desc: Retired lock instructions. High speculative cacheable lock speculation succeeded

events.name: ls_locks.spec_lock_lo_spec
events.desc: Retired lock instructions. Low speculative cacheable lock speculation succeeded

events.name: ls_misal_loads.ma64
events.desc: The number of 64B misaligned (i.e., cacheline crossing) loads

events.name: ls_not_halted_cyc
events.desc: Cycles not in Halt

events.name: ls_pref_instr_disp
events.desc: Software Prefetch Instructions Dispatched (Speculative)

events.name: ls_pref_instr_disp.prefetch
events.desc: Software Prefetch Instructions Dispatched (Speculative). PrefetchT0, T1 and T2 instructions. See docAPM3 PREFETCHlevel

events.name: ls_pref_instr_disp.prefetch_w
events.desc: Software Prefetch Instructions Dispatched (Speculative). PrefetchW instruction. See docAPM3 PREFETCHW

events.name: ls_rdtsc
events.desc: Number of reads of the TSC (RDTSC instructions). The count is speculative

events.name: ls_ret_cl_flush
events.desc: The number of retired CLFLUSH instructions. This is a non-speculative event

events.name: ls_ret_cpuid
events.desc: The number of CPUID instructions retired

events.name: ls_smi_rx
events.desc: Counts the number of SMIs received

events.name: ls_st_commit_cancel2.st_commit_cancel_wcb_full
events.desc: A non-cacheable store and the non-cacheable commit buffer is full

events.name: ls_stlf
events.desc: Number of STLF hits

events.name: ls_sw_pf_dc_fills.ext_cache_remote
events.desc: Software Prefetch Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From CCX Cache in different Node

events.name: ls_sw_pf_dc_fills.int_cache
events.desc: Software Prefetch Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From L3 or different L2 in same CCX

events.name: ls_sw_pf_dc_fills.lcl_l2
events.desc: Software Prefetch Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From Local L2 to the core

events.name: ls_sw_pf_dc_fills.mem_io_local
events.desc: Software Prefetch Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From DRAM or IO connected in same node

events.name: ls_sw_pf_dc_fills.mem_io_remote
events.desc: Software Prefetch Data Cache Fills by Data Source. From DRAM or IO connected in different Node

events.name: ls_tlb_flush.all_tlb_flushes
events.desc: All TLB Flushes. Requires unit mask 0xFF to engage event for counting. Use all_tlbs_flushed instead

events.name: de_dis_cops_from_decoder.disp_op_type.any_fp_dispatch
events.desc: Any FP dispatch. Types of Oops Dispatched from Decoder

events.name: de_dis_cops_from_decoder.disp_op_type.any_integer_dispatch
events.desc: Any Integer dispatch. Types of Oops Dispatched from Decoder

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls1.fp_flush_recovery_stall
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a Token Stall. Also counts cycles when the thread is not selected to dispatch but would have been stalled due to a Token Stall. FP Flush recovery stall

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls1.fp_reg_file_rsrc_stall
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a Token Stall. Also counts cycles when the thread is not selected to dispatch but would have been stalled due to a Token Stall. Floating point register file resource stall. Applies to all FP ops that have a destination register

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls1.fp_sch_rsrc_stall
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a Token Stall. Also counts cycles when the thread is not selected to dispatch but would have been stalled due to a Token Stall. FP scheduler resource stall. Applies to ops that use the FP scheduler

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls1.int_phy_reg_file_rsrc_stall
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a Token Stall. Also counts cycles when the thread is not selected to dispatch but would have been stalled due to a Token Stall. Integer Physical Register File resource stall. Integer Physical Register File, applies to all ops that have an integer destination register

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls1.int_sched_misc_token_stall
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a token stall. Integer Scheduler miscellaneous resource stall

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls1.load_queue_rsrc_stall
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a Token Stall. Also counts cycles when the thread is not selected to dispatch but would have been stalled due to a Token Stall. Load Queue resource stall. Applies to all ops with load semantics

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls1.store_queue_rsrc_stall
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a Token Stall. Also counts cycles when the thread is not selected to dispatch but would have been stalled due to a Token Stall. Store Queue resource stall. Applies to all ops with store semantics

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls1.taken_brnch_buffer_rsrc
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a Token Stall. Also counts cycles when the thread is not selected to dispatch but would have been stalled due to a Token Stall. Taken branch buffer resource stall

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls2.agsq_token_stall
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a token stall. AGSQ Tokens unavailable

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls2.int_sch0_token_stall
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a token stall. No tokens for Integer Scheduler Queue 0 available

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls2.int_sch1_token_stall
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a token stall. No tokens for Integer Scheduler Queue 1 available

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls2.int_sch2_token_stall
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a token stall. No tokens for Integer Scheduler Queue 2 available

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls2.int_sch3_token_stall
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a token stall. No tokens for Integer Scheduler Queue 3 available

events.name: de_dis_dispatch_token_stalls2.retire_token_stall
events.desc: Cycles where a dispatch group is valid but does not get dispatched due to a token stall. Insufficient Retire Queue tokens available

events.name: de_dis_uop_queue_empty_di0
events.desc: Cycles where the Micro-Op Queue is empty
